name: Vodnika the Fountain Spirit
desc: If a Level 10 monster(s) is sent to the GY, except "Vodnika the Fountain Spirit" (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your GY (if it was there when the monster was sent) or hand (even if not) in Defense Position, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can target 1 Level 10 monster in your GY; Special Summon it to your opponent's field (but negate its effects), then draw 1 card. You can only use each effect of "Vodnika the Fountain Spirit" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If a Level 10 monster(s) is sent to the GY, except "Vodnika the Fountain Spirit" (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your GY (if it was there when the monster was sent) or hand (even if not) in Defense Position, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can target 1 Level 10 monster in your GY; Special Summon it to your opponent's field (but negate its effects), then draw 1 card. You can only use each effect of "Vodnika the Fountain Spirit" once per turn.
eff: If a Level 10 monster(s) is sent to the GY, except "Vodnika the Fountain Spirit" (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your GY (if it was there when the monster was sent) or hand (even if not) in Defense Position, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can target 1 Level 10 monster in your GY; Special Summon it to your opponent's field (but negate its effects), then draw 1 card. You can only use each effect of "Vodnika the Fountain Spirit" once per turn.

action: Activates if other cards are sent to the Graveyard
mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
Special Summons from your Graveyard to your opponent's field
banished: Banishes itself when it leaves the field
